name: Lenovo ThinkVision T27Q-40 27" IPS Monitor - 2560x1440 - 48-120Hz Variable Refresh Rate - Full Ergonomic Stand - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - 1x USB-C 3.2 Gen 1 (PD 15W data only) - USB-B 3.2 Gen 1 Upstream - 3x USB-A 3.2 Gen 1 Downstream (64A6GAR6UZ)
description: Professional 27-inch QHD monitor with variable refresh rate and ergonomic design for office use.

specs.usb_ports: 1x USB-C 3.2 Gen 1 (PD 15W data only), 1x USB-B 3.2 Gen 1 Upstream, 3x USB-A 3.2 Gen 1 Downstream
